requirement.title: Parse Behavioral Assertion Prefixes
requirement.description: Assertions prefixed with [tool_called], [tool_not_called], [tool_before], [tool_count], [tool_adjacent] are recognized as behavioral assertions and separated from text assertions.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: "[tool_called] Skill:arc-verifying" is parsed as { operator: 'tool_called', name: 'Skill', pattern: 'arc-verifying' }. REQ-F006

"[tool_before] Skill:arc-verifying < Skill:arc-finishing-epic" is parsed as { operator: 'tool_before', a: {name:'Skill', pattern:'arc-verifying'}, b: {name:'Skill', pattern:'arc-finishing-epic'} }. REQ-F006
"[tool_count] Bash:npm test >= 2" is parsed as { operator: 'tool_count', name: 'Bash', pattern: 'npm test', min: 2 }. REQ-F006
"[ ] Agent mentions verification" (no prefix) is classified as text assertion. REQ-F006
"[tool_not_called] Bash:git push" is parsed as { operator: 'tool_not_called', name: 'Bash', pattern: 'git push' }. REQ-F006
"[tool_adjacent] A ~ B" is parsed as { operator: 'tool_adjacent', a: {...}, b: {...} }. REQ-F006

requirement.title: Grade Behavioral Assertions Deterministically
requirement.description: Each behavioral assertion is evaluated against the action log using deterministic code logic. No model calls.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: tool_called: returns 1 if any action matches name AND args contains pattern (substring match). Returns 0 otherwise. REQ-F007
tool_not_called: returns 1 if NO action matches name + pattern. Returns 0 if any match found. REQ-F007
tool_before: compares first occurrence of A and first occurrence of B. Returns 1 if A.index < B.index. Returns 0 if A missing, B missing, or A.index >= B.index. REQ-F007
tool_count: counts actions matching name + pattern. Returns 1 if count >= min. Returns 0 otherwise. REQ-F007
tool_adjacent: returns 1 if A and B both exist and no other tool actions appear between them (text entries are allowed between). Returns 0 otherwise. REQ-F007
All behavioral assertion grading completes without any LLM API calls. REQ-N003
